final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original Xiaohongshu (小红书) UGC creator cover image in a 9-grid portrait format, styled as an authentic grassroots influencer post, featuring the DJI Pocket 4 as the hero product.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu 素人 (everyday-creator) aesthetic — candid warmth, slightly over-saturated pastel energy, the handmade charm of a real person's feed rather than a polished brand shoot; 9-grid tile layout with the cover as the focal tile
Composition: portrait 9-grid cover layout; DJI Pocket 4 product centered and prominent in the frame, surrounded by lifestyle context that feels genuinely personal and unscripted
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 camera as hero product, held or displayed naturally as a real user would; the overall scene reads as a first-impression unboxing or casual first-use moment
Scene/backdrop: warm, softly cluttered personal space — a desk, a cozy corner, or a café table — the kind of background a real 素人 blogger would actually shoot in
Lighting/mood: the gentle, slightly warm glow of natural window light mixed with the soft buzz of everyday life; approachable and inviting, not studio-lit
Color palette: warm pastel tones — creamy whites, soft peach, and a hint of sky blue; the palette of a well-curated but not over-designed personal feed
Materials/textures: matte paper-like softness in the background; the product's clean matte-black surface in honest contrast with the warm surroundings
Text (verbatim): 大疆pocket4初体验
Constraints: title text "大疆pocket4初体验" must be clearly legible at the center of the cover tile; font style must be cute and visually differentiated — rounded, playful, hand-lettering-inspired or bubbly typeface, not a standard system font; 9-grid cover portrait format
Avoid: overly polished brand-campaign look, dark dramatic lighting, generic tech-review aesthetic, stiff product-on-white photography, serif or corporate fonts for the title
